ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Type of sport */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the tournament */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizing entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player (e.g., player, coach, administrator) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player's team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the match belongs to */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of player 1 */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of player 2 */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "round" TEXT /* Round of the match (e.g., Table of 64) */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match is held */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the match */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match result */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the result belongs to */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winner */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loser */,
  "winning_score" TEXT /* Score by which the winner won */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the match */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the match */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the match */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the match result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_results_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the standing belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank of the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the player */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
column_names: Role of the player (e.g., player, coach, administrator)
Date of birth of the player
ID of the player's team (if applicable)
ID of the tournament the match belongs to
Round of the match (e.g., Table of 64)
Date and time of the match

Unique identifier for each match result
ID of the match the result belongs to
